---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is not working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Minimal Reproducible Example

```python
import pyserep

# Paste the smallest code that reproduces the bug
```

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (include the full traceback).

## Environment

```
pyserep version : (run: python -c "import pyserep; print(pyserep.__version__)")
Python version  : (run: python --version)
NumPy version   : (run: python -c "import numpy; print(numpy.__version__)")
SciPy version   : (run: python -c "import scipy; print(scipy.__version__)")
OS              : (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14)
```

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information (model size, matrix format, etc.).
